TRG - Cooler Sec Air T.description: AI Target: Cooler Secondary Air T
TRG - Cooler Sec Air T.formula: (`Secondary air T1` > `Secondary air T2`) * `Secondary air T1` + (`Secondary air T1` <= `Secondary air T2`) * `Secondary air T2`

TRG - Cyclone C4 Max T.description: AI Target: Cyclone C4 Max Gas T
TRG - Cyclone C4 Max T.formula: (`C4N gas T` > `C4P gas T`) * `C4N gas T` + (`C4N gas T` <= `C4P gas T`) * `C4P gas T`

TRG - Kiln BZT Max.description: AI Target: Kiln Burning Zone Max T
TRG - Kiln BZT Max.formula: (`Kiln BZT1` > `Kiln BZT2`) * `Kiln BZT1` + (`Kiln BZT1` <= `Kiln BZT2`) * `Kiln BZT2`

TRG - Tertiary Air dP.description: AI Target:Cooler Tertiary Air Duct dP

fuel_calorific_pairing.comment: Maps each fuel flow tag to its corresponding calorific value tag. Used to compute specific heat input (GJ/h = flow x CV) instead of raw flow rate.

golden_prefilter.comment: Professional Stability Envelope: Pre-filter applied BEFORE fingerprint search. Excludes startups, cold kilns, and reducing environments. Ensures AI only learns from 'High Efficiency' historical periods.

hcf_config.comment: Heat Compensation Factor: operational BZT-trend correlation. All parameters here; zero code changes needed to adjust behaviour.

model_name: Cimpor Kiln 3 - Working Names Restored V22.0

nudge_settings.comment: Controls how setpoints are nudged each cycle. step_fraction = fraction of the gap to close per cycle. Fast response enabled for validation.

operational_matrix_settings.description: Dynamic Weight Bias based on Operational Matrix. All logic driven from this config.

hot_kiln_rule.comment: When BZT is hot, reduce fuel first. Feed increase is secondary and only applied if fuel is already trending down.

optimisation_target.comment: Primary target is kiln torque (motor current) in the 280-300A range. BZT and O2 are co-targets. Motor current cannot be fooled by coating unlike BZT alone.

safety_rules.comment: Reduce main burner fuel gradually by max ramp_rate t/h per cycle. No step change allowed.
safety_rules.name: BZT Critical High

scoring_settings.comment: age_penalty_per_day: penalty per calendar day old (0.5 = 365 days old loses 182 points). recency_boost: flat bonus for fingerprints within N days. trend: bonus/penalty for directional alignment.

BALANCED.description: Balanced optimization: Maintains high thermal efficiency (SHC) while maximizing alternative fuel substitution (TSR).

SHC_MIN.description: Minimise specific heat consumption (SHC) without reducing TSR below baseline. Switch to TSR_MAX to target alternative fuel maximisation instead.

TSR_MAX.description: Maximise alternative fuel use (TSR) without raising SHC above baseline. Switch to SHC_MIN to target thermal efficiency instead.

_INSTRUCTIONS: HOW TO CREATE A NEW STRATEGY:
2. Paste it below and rename the key (e.g. 'FEED_MAX', 'STABLE_OPS').
3. Fill in your optimisation_target, golden_prefilter, and stability_tags.
4. Set 'active_strategy' at the top of this file to your new strategy name.
5. The engine will reload automatically on the next scan cycle.
STABILITY IS ALWAYS ENFORCED: The stability_tags check runs on every candidate
regardless of strategy. Adding more tags here only makes it stricter.
USER_DEFINED.description: User-defined custom strategy. Edit targets and filters to suit your operational goal.

Kiln feed._comment: Only search history where feed was above 250 t/h (exclude low-production periods)

Kiln motor 1 Amps._comment: Only consider kiln states in normal operating current range

SHC._comment: Exclude inefficient periods from history pool

golden_prefilter._comment: Hard gates: historical rows MUST satisfy ALL these ranges to even be considered.

optimisation_target._comment: Defines WHAT the engine is hunting for. primary_tag is the KPI to optimise.
optimisation_target._direction_note: Options: 'maximize' or 'minimize'. Controls which historical percentile is targeted.
optimisation_target._weight_note: Positive = maximise (e.g. TSR). Negative = minimise (e.g. SHC). Larger abs = more aggressive.

co_targets._comment: Co-targets are secondary KPIs. The engine balances all of them together.
co_targets._weight_note: Positive = higher is better. Negative = lower is better.
Negative weight: engine prefers historical rows where SHC was LOW

stability_tags._comment: Stability check: the 120 minutes AFTER a candidate timestamp must be stable on these tags.
stability_tags._threshold_note: Coefficient of variation must be below 15% over the lookahead window

cooler_grate_c1_stop.description: Grate Central 1 stop - increase other grates

cooler_grate_c2_stop.description: Grate Central 2 stop - increase other grates

cooler_grate_l_stop.description: Grate Left stop - increase other grates

cooler_grate_r_stop.description: Grate Right stop - increase other grates

kiln_alf_cut_reduction.description: ALF (RIP) cut/reduction - diff more than 300 lph for 10 sec

kiln_coating_ring_fall.description: Coating ring fall down - Amps step increase > 100

kiln_rdf_cut_reduction.description: RDF cut/reduction - diff more than 500 kgh for 10 sec

pc_excess_raw_meal.description: Excess of raw meal to the calciner

pc_missing_raw_meal.description: Missing raw meal to the calciner

pc_rdf_cut_reduction.description: RDF (PC) cut/reduction - diff more than 1.0 tph
